scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:python
scripts.content:sync:inputs: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase sync --manifest content/pilot-rf-sources.yaml --input-root content --output-root data/synced/rf-public-pilot --cache-root .cache/localmed/sources --report data/build/source-sync-report.json
scripts.content:sync:regulatory: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase sync --manifest content/regulatory-rf-pilot-sources.yaml --input-root content --output-root data/synced/rf-regulatory-pilot --cache-root .cache/localmed/regulatory-sources --report data/build/regulatory-source-sync-report.json
scripts.content:sync:clinical: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase sync --manifest content/full-respiratory-rf-sources.yaml --input-root content --output-root data/raw/full-respiratory-rf --cache-root .cache/localmed/clinical-sources --report data/build/clinical-source-sync-report.json
scripts.content:catalog:clinical: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase-clinical-catalog official-sync --output data/raw/official-clinical-registry/catalog.json --raw-output data/raw/official-clinical-registry/api-pages.json --report data/build/official-clinical-registry-report.json && uv run --project tools/ingest medbase-clinical-catalog build --source data/raw/official-clinical-registry/catalog.json --taxonomy content/clinical-module-taxonomy.yaml --overrides content/clinical-coverage-overrides.yaml --output data/build/official-clinical-coverage-ledger.json && uv run --project tools/ingest medbase-clinical-catalog check-selected --catalog data/raw/official-clinical-registry/catalog.json --registry content/full-respiratory-rf-registry.yaml --output data/build/selected-clinical-source-status.json
scripts.content:prepare:clinical: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase prepare --registry content/full-respiratory-rf-registry.yaml --source-root data/raw/full-respiratory-rf --output data/intermediate/full-respiratory-rf --force
scripts.content:lint:clinical: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase lint --input data/intermediate/full-respiratory-rf
scripts.content:build:clinical: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase build --input data/intermediate/full-respiratory-rf --output data/build/full-respiratory-rf.db --report data/build/full-respiratory-rf-report.json
scripts.content:rebuild:clinical: bun run content:catalog:clinical && bun run content:sync:clinical && bun run content:prepare:clinical && bun run content:lint:clinical && bun run content:build:clinical
scripts.content:collect:drugs: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase collect-drugs --catalog data/raw/drug-sources.yaml --input-root data/raw --output-root data/raw/collected-drugs --cache-root .cache/localmed/drugs --report data/build/drug-source-report.json
scripts.content:ai:export: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase ai-export --input data/intermediate/private-pilot --output data/intermediate/chatgpt-tasks.jsonl
scripts.content:lint: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase lint --input content/fixtures
scripts.content:build: bun run content:compile && bun run content:publish
scripts.content:lint:pilot: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase lint --input content/pilot-rf
scripts.content:build:pilot: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase build --input content/pilot-rf --output data/build/rf-public-pilot.db --report data/build/rf-public-pilot-report.json
scripts.content:lint:regulatory: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase lint --input content/regulatory-rf-pilot
scripts.content:build:regulatory: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase build --input content/regulatory-rf-pilot --output data/build/rf-regulatory-pilot.db --report data/build/rf-regulatory-pilot-report.json
scripts.content:build:regulatory:synced: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase build --input data/synced/rf-regulatory-pilot --output data/build/rf-regulatory-pilot.db --report data/build/rf-regulatory-pilot-report.json
scripts.content:rebuild:regulatory: bun run content:sync:regulatory && uv run --project tools/ingest medbase lint --input data/synced/rf-regulatory-pilot && bun run content:build:regulatory:synced && bun run benchmark:regulatory
scripts.content:build:synced: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase build --input data/synced/rf-public-pilot --output data/build/rf-public-pilot.db --report data/build/rf-public-pilot-report.json
scripts.content:rebuild:auto: bun run content:sync:inputs && uv run --project tools/ingest medbase lint --input data/synced/rf-public-pilot && bun run content:build:synced && bun run benchmark:pilot
scripts.content:prepare:private: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase prepare --registry data/raw/sources.yaml --source-root data/raw --output data/intermediate/private-pilot --force
scripts.content:lint:private: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase lint --input data/intermediate/private-pilot
scripts.content:build:private: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase build --input data/intermediate/private-pilot --output data/build/private-pilot.db --report data/build/private-pilot-report.json
scripts.python:check: uv run --project tools/ingest ruff format --check tools/ingest/src tools/ingest/tests && uv run --project tools/ingest ruff check tools/ingest/src tools/ingest/tests && uv run --project tools/ingest pyright tools/ingest/src tools/ingest/tests && uv run --project tools/ingest pytest tools/ingest/tests
scripts.benchmark:queries:import: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase benchmark-import-real-pocqi --output data/intermediate/clinical-benchmark/real-pocqi.jsonl --report data/build/real-pocqi-import-report.json
scripts.benchmark:queries:contracts: uv run --project tools/ingest python -m localmed_ingest.clinical_query_contracts --contracts tools/benchmarks/russian-scenario-contracts.json --retrieval tools/benchmarks/pilot-rf-queries.json --retrieval tools/benchmarks/pilot-rf-drug-queries.json --report data/build/russian-scenario-contract-report.json
scripts.benchmark:queries: bun run benchmark:queries:import && bun run benchmark:queries:annotate && bun run benchmark:queries:contracts
scripts.build: bun run schema:check && bun run build:app && bun run build:landing
scripts.content:compile: uv run --project tools/ingest medbase build --input content/fixtures --output data/build/core-demo.db --json-output packages/test-fixtures/src/generated/core-demo.json --report data/build/core-demo-report.json
scripts.benchmark:all: bun run benchmark:search && bun run benchmark:cases
